title: George Town、Penang — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: George Town、Penang的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

George Town是Penang的一個城市，人口約794,000。Penang’s UNESCO-listed capital, famous for its street art, colonial architecture, and world-renowned street food.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
